Description: Clarity, relevance, and feasibility of the problem statement; alignment with the project domain.

CriterionName: 2. Literature Survey (Background Study)/ Market and patent analysis - IA
Description: Depth and relevance of reviewed literature; ability to connect existing work to the problem domain and the identification of technical gaps

CriterionName: 4. Research Objectives/ Product goals Formulation - GA
Description: Clarity, measurability, and relevance of project objectives/goals derived from the problem and gap analysis.

CriterionName: 5. Alignment with Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) - GA
Description: Extent to which the project aligns with relevant UN SDGs and demonstrates societal relevance.
Clarity, organization, and professionalism of the presentation and documentation.
